name: LobsterBoard
author: Curbob
description: Self-hosted drag-and-drop dashboard builder with 60+ widgets, template gallery, custom pages, zero cloud dependencies. OpenClaw-compatible. One Node.js server, no build step.
key_features: AI/LLM usage monitoring (Antigravity, Claude Code, Gemini, Cursor, Copilot)
System monitoring: CPU, RAM, Disk, Network, Docker
OpenClaw integration (auth status, cron jobs, activity logs)
ai_widgets: Antigravity (Gemini 3, Claude via Google — antigravity-usage login)
relation_to_aios: Provides visual dashboard for AI OS monitoring — especially the Antigravity + Claude Code AI usage widgets match directly
